message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam participantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

box "host" #FFFFFF
participant "MultiDisplayService" as MDS
end box

box "rcv" #FFFFFF
participant "IMultipleDisplaysUiController" as UI
participant "IMultipleDisplaysDelegate" as DEL
end box

box "controller" #FFFFFF
participant "DisplaysSwapViewController" as VC
participant "DisplaysSwapPresenter" as PRES
end box

MDS -> MDS : onDisplayAdded
MDS -> UI : updateDisplayInfos
MDS -> MDS : onDisplayRemoved
MDS -> UI : updateDisplayInfos

VC -> PRES : swap()
PRES -> UI : swap()

DEL -> PRES : onUpdateDisplayInfo(IMultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
DEL -> MDS : onUpdateDisplayInfo(IMultipleDisplaysUiController var1, EMultipleDisplaysAction var2)
PRES -> PRES : loadMonitorsIndicator()
MDS -> MDS : notifyMultiDisplayChanged(type: MultiDisplayChangeType,displayId: Int)

@enduml
```
